reviews.review_description: First time I encountered West African griots. Wasn't familiar with their culture, but really enjoyed it. The app is basically for relaxation and immersing in culture. Very simple. If that's up your alley, you'll enjoy it.
I enjoyed exploring the environments and running into some great works of poetry that I've always liked while also getting to experience some new ones! Ozymandias and the whole gang are here.

Very interesting variety of environments in Verse, I really enjoyed listening to the music and sounds of nature as I explored.  The African village was my favorite, it was something I never experienced before, and I felt like I was there. I also really wish the menu scene was more interactable it feels very cozy.
I purchased Deluxe Verse VR and only one of the environments is accessible....all the others have a "lock" symbol next to them and are unresponsive.

developer_response.body: Hi Dharmadeb, there is a tutorial you need to complete in the first level (Orchid Pavilion) and then all the levels will unlock after that. Can you please try that and let us know if you are still experiencing issues?

reviews.review_description: What a stunning blend of poetry, culture, and place. Experiences like this are what make immersive technology so fascinating.
